name: field
hints: You are outside Claymorgue Castle. The drawbridge is raised and a moat surrounds the castle. Most directions lead to the enchanted forest.
DIG in the field to find something useful. You need to find a way to lower the drawbridge or cross the moat.
DIG to find a buried item. The forest (N/S/W) is enchanted and loops. You need to get across the moat somehow - the permeability spell or swimming may help.
DIG to unearth an item. To enter the castle: lower the drawbridge from inside, or use magic to cross the moat. The permeability spell is found inside the courtyard.
notes: Starting room outside Claymorgue Castle. The drawbridge is raised and the moat blocks entry. DIG reveals a buried item. N/S/W all lead to the enchanted forest (room 9) which loops. The player must find a way into the castle - eventually through the drawbridge (room 2) or moat (room 16).
